1. 二维码key生成 

请求：

GET /login/qr/key?timestamp=1780547659529

响应：

```json
{
    "data": {
        "code": 200,
        "unikey": "df555c61-ce46-4dfc-b62a-02aa13728a80"
    },
    "code": 200
}
```

2. 生成二维码（响应数据为base64编码）

请求：

GET /login/qr/create?key=df555c61-ce46-4dfc-b62a-02aa13728a80&qrimg=true&timestamp=1780547700920

响应：

```json
{
    "code": 200,
    "data": {
        "qrurl": "https://music.163.com/login?codekey=df555c61-ce46-4dfc-b62a-02aa13728a80",
        "qrimg": "data:image/png;base64,"
    }
}
```

3. 检测二维码扫描状态

请求：

GET /login/qr/check?key=df555c61-ce46-4dfc-b62a-02aa13728a80&timestamp=1780547401803

响应：

```json
{
    "code": 803,
    "message": "授权登陆成功",
    "cookie": "xxx"
}
```
